case_title: SANTO ANGEL SALADO DIEGUEZ VS. TMGG, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DBA PIZZA

docket_entries.description: ORDER SETTING ASIDE THE JUDGMENT ENTERED BY THE LABOR COMMISSIONER PURSUANT TO LABOR CODE SECTION 98.2 (E)
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER TO SET ASIDE THE JUDGMENT ENTERED BY THE LABOR COMMISSIONER PURSUANT TO LABOR CODE SECTION 98.2 (E) FILED BY INTERVENOR LABOR COMMISSIONER

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DIEGUEZ, SANTO ANGEL SALADO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TMGG, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DBA PIZZA ORGASMICA AND BREWING COMPANY $20,944.90 PRINCIPAL, $465.51 INTEREST, $300.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $21,710.41, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
